---
title: "test_injection_neutralization.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/augmented_intel/test_injection_neutralization.py"
loc: 18
complexity: 1
logic_score: 9.18
style_score: 4.09
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 7.41
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating TestInjectionNeutralization, test_heimdall_guard_basic.

## Interaction Protocol
Import TestInjectionNeutralization and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 9.2/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.1/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [src.sentinel.code_sanitizer](file://src.sentinel.code_sanitizer)

### Exports
- `TestInjectionNeutralization`
- `test_heimdall_guard_basic`
- `test_heimdall_guard_case_insensitivity`
- `test_integration_with_sanitize_code`
